northStar: Cosmic Developer Console — a dark, galaxy-themed environment where vibrant digital signals glow.

dos: Prioritize Cloud White (#ffffff) text on Nova Black (#080f24) backgrounds for primary content.
Use Nova Pink (#ff0043) for brand accents and key headlines like 'Nova ®'.
Apply Sky Blue (#008fff) or Terminal Green (#0efe06) for primary interactive elements, such as download buttons or 'Buy Now'.
Maintain a compact typographical scale with Hellix, utilizing the distinct letter-spacing for larger headlines: -0.05em at 62px.
Ensure all buttons have a 5px border-radius.
Use 18px as the default element and card padding to maintain spaciousness in the dark UI.
Define section boundaries with a 3px solid Cloud White (#ffffff) line.
donts: Avoid using multiple chromatic colors in close proximity that are not part of a deliberate accent spectrum.
Do not introduce light backgrounds beyond Button Gray (#f2f2f2) or Cloud White (#ffffff) for specific UI elements, as the theme is predominantly dark.
Refrain from using heavily decorative fonts; Hellix provides the required functionality and aesthetic.
Do not deviate from the established button radii of 5px; larger or smaller radii will conflict with the precise aesthetic.
Avoid excessive use of shadows or gradients; the design leans into flat surfaces with vibrant color accents.
Do not use generic blue (#0000ee) for links; use either Sky Blue (#008fff) or rely on Cloud White (#ffffff) with an underline.
Avoid letter spacing changes for body text; apply tracking only to larger headline sizes as specified.

colors.name: Nova Black
colors.role: Page background, surface backgrounds, dark text on light elements, outlining ghost buttons

colors.name: Cloud White
colors.role: Primary text on dark backgrounds, icon fills, primary borders

colors.name: Button Gray
colors.role: Default filled button background, primary surface for interactive elements on hover

colors.name: Subtle Gray
colors.role: Muted text, secondary navigation, subtle button backgrounds

colors.name: Nova Pink
colors.role: Brand accent in logo, key headlines, and active state indicators — injects urgency

colors.name: Sky Blue
colors.role: Blue outline accent for tags, dividers, and focused UI edges. Do not promote it to the primary CTA color

colors.name: Terminal Green
colors.role: Green accent for outlined action borders, linked labels, and lightweight interactive emphasis.

colors.name: Vivid Violet
colors.role: Decorative highlights, feature callouts, secondary accents

colors.name: Alert Red
colors.role: Red outline accent for tags, dividers, and focused UI edges. Use as a supporting accent, not as a status color

colors.name: Sunset Orange
colors.role: Orange outline accent for tags, dividers, and focused UI edges.

colors.name: Marigold Gold
colors.role: Orange outline accent for tags, dividers, and focused UI edges.

designSystem.layout: The page primarily uses a full-bleed structure against a dark, cosmic background, with content centered. The hero section features a large, centered headline over the background. Subsequent sections often alternate between text-dominant blocks and paired text-left/image-right (or vice-versa) layouts. A consistent vertical rhythm is maintained with visual separators (3px white line) between major content blocks. Navigation is a sticky top bar with minimal links and a prominent 'Buy Now' button. Feature lists often use multi-column card grids.
designSystem.imagery: The visual language combines abstract, cosmic background imagery with starkly contrasting, detailed 3D product illustrations. Photography is absent. Icons are typically filled, monochrome (white), or occasionally brand-colored. Product screenshots are contained within device mockups (Mac windows) with code highlighting. Imagery serves a decorative, atmospheric, and explanatory role, providing visual context to features without distracting from the UI. Density is balanced, with imagery often confined to dedicated sections or illustrative accents rather than being full-bleed throughout text-heavy areas.

similar.why: Dark-mode UI, code-editor focused, functional layout, and a subtle use of accent colors for syntax highlighting/status.
Minimalist black UI, high-contrast text, and a developer-centric aesthetic.
Deep dark backgrounds, vivid accent colors for interactive elements/links, and clear, structured content presentation.
Minimal aesthetic, high contrast, compact typography, and judicious use of accent colors to denote states or actions in a dark theme.

designSystem.northStar: Cosmic Developer Console — a dark, galaxy-themed environment where vibrant digital signals glow.

components.name: Solid Primary Button
components.description: Background: Nova Black (#080f24), Text: Cloud White (#ffffff), Padding: 18px vertical, 26px horizontal, Border Radius: 5px.

components.name: Ghost Accent Button
components.description: Background: Button Gray (#f2f2f2), Text: Nova Black (#080f24), Padding: 17.5px vertical, 17.5px horizontal, Border Radius: 5px. This uses the default light button treatment against the dark page as a secondary CTA, giving visual contrast rather than a filled brand color.

components.name: Circular Icon Button
components.role: Small, interactive icons or mini-buttons with illustrative elements.
components.description: Background: Subtle Gray (#878787), Text: Nova Black (#080f24), Padding: 20px all around, Border Radius: 100% (circular).

components.name: Navigation Link
components.description: Text: Cloud White (#ffffff), Hover text: Subtle Gray (#878787), Hover background: Terminal Green (#0efe06) for 'Buy Now', otherwise no background change. Margin 5px right and left.

components.name: Feature Card
components.role: Showcasing product features with icons and descriptive text.
components.description: Padding: 18px at top/bottom. Likely uses a subtle background color like Nova Black or similar with Cloud White text. Border radius 9px, no visible shadow.

components.name: Section Separator
components.description: Horizontal rule with 3px solid white (#ffffff) border, indicating a crisp break in content flow.

typography.role: The primary typeface for all text content. Its compact nature and varied weights support both minimalist headlines and clear body text, maintaining legibility against a dark background.

designSystem.description: Nova embraces a dark, cosmic developer UI, grounding vivid neon accents against a deep, starry background. Typography is compact and functional, prioritizing clear information display within restrained layouts. Interactive elements punctuate the dark canvas with bright blues, greens, and a spectrum of saturated hues for status indicators or feature highlights, creating a focused, high-contrast experience.

customSections.title: Agent Prompt Guide
customSections.content:
Quick Color Reference: 
text: #ffffff
background: #080f24
border: #ffffff
accent: #008fff
primary action: #f2f2f2 (filled action)

Example Component Prompts:
1. Create a Primary Action Button: #f2f2f2 background, #ffffff text, 9999px radius, compact pill padding. Use this filled treatment for the main CTA.
2. Create a navigation bar item for 'Buy Now': Hellix 18px, text #ffffff, background #0efe06, 5px border-radius, 18px vertical padding, 26px horizontal padding. Include an icon (e.g., a star) in white #ffffff.
3. Create a feature card titled 'Useful tools': Hellix 26px, #ffffff, with a descriptive body text in Hellix 18px, #ffffff. Use a card background of Nova Black #080f24, 9px border-radius, and 18px padding. Above the heading, include an icon (e.g., a hammer) rendered in a monochromatic style.
